title: Flavoured Canadian Spring Onion Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with the sweetness of spring onions and the richness of Canadian ingredients.
instructions: In a large pot, melt the margarine over medium heat.
Add the chopped spring onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the flavoured soup stock and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the dissolved flour and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Return the pot to medium heat and stir in the grated cheddar cheese until melted.
Add the heated half-and-half and stir until combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
